evidence.note: On Windows, forcing real permission-denied rename is unreliable. Rust unit test uses injected failure hook which fully exercises the cleanup code path.

All safety assertions (VAL-SAFE-001 through VAL-SAFE-010) and VAL-CROSS-013 verified through both CLI testing and Rust unit tests (33/33 AST rewrite tests passed).
